input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.5.9.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.5.9.4
            TITLE: when the voltage outside the accumulator container(s) is below t.9.1.1, the tsal must:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.5.9.4: When the voltage outside the Accumulator Container(s) is below T.9.1.1, the TSAL must:
EV.5.9.4 When the voltage outside the Accumulator Container(s) is below T.9.1.1, the TSAL must: 
a. Be Color:  Green 
b. Stay continuously illuminated

final_answer: EV.5.9.4 When the voltage outside the Accumulator Container(s) is below T.9.1.1, the TSAL must: a. Be Color: Green b. Stay continuously illuminated
